title: CT16 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {_capability : CT16.Capability P} → {_context : Core.BranchContext P} → CT16.Input _capability _context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Input.mk

internalDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max uAmbient uBranch)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.BranchContext
internalDeclarations.docString:
The inherited state of one branch, shared by dependent CT inputs and route
triggers.

internalDeclarations.type: Type (max (uAmbient + 1) (uBranch + 1))
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem
internalDeclarations.docString:
Mathematical data shared by every tactic in one structural-exhaustion
proof instance.

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT16.Capability P → Type uCoordinate
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.Coordinate

internalDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type uAmbient
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem.Ambient

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → List α → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult
internalDeclarations.docString: Search evidence relative to an arbitrary finite list.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result
internalDeclarations.docString: The result of exhaustive search over an exact finite universe.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (xs : List α) → (p : α → Prop) → ((value : α) → Decidable (p value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (enumeration : FinEnum α) (p : α → Prop),
  (∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) → ∀ (value : α), ¬p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (enumeration : FinEnum α) →
    (p : α → Prop) →
      (motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p → Sort u_2) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((absentProof : ∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent absentProof)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT16.ProperSupportResidual capability context → CT16.SupportDecision capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.SupportDecision.proper

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT16.WholeSupportState capability context → CT16.SupportDecision capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.SupportDecision.whole

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      (missing : capability.Coordinate) →
        ¬capability.InSupport context.G missing → CT16.ProperSupportResidual capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ProperSupportResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {capability : CT16.Capability P} {context : Core.BranchContext P},
  (∀ (coordinate : capability.Coordinate), capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) →
    CT16.WholeSupportState capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.WholeSupportState.mk

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT16.Capability P → Type uCode
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.ClosedCode

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      CT16.WholeSupportState capability context →
        (code : capability.ClosedCode) →
          code = capability.closedCode context.G → CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ClosedCodeState.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      {state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context} →
        CT16.ExactCodeCertificate capability context → CT16.CodeDecision capability context state
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.CodeDecision.equal

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      {state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context} →
        CT16.ClosedTypeMismatchResidual capability context → CT16.CodeDecision capability context state
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.CodeDecision.mismatch

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      (state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context) →
        state.code = capability.targetCode → CT16.ExactCodeCertificate capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ExactCodeCertificate.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      (state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context) →
        state.code ≠ capability.targetCode → CT16.ClosedTypeMismatchResidual capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ClosedTypeMismatchResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  CT16.Capability P → Core.BranchContext P → CT16.Graph.NodeId → CT16.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.Edge

internalDeclarations.type: CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.NodeId.properTerminal

internalDeclarations.type: CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.NodeId.supportScan

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT16.Capability P} → {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → CT16.ExecutionResult C ctx → List CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ExecutionResult.trace

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {C : CT16.Capability P} {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} (r : CT16.ExecutionResult C ctx),
  CT16.Graph.ValidTrace r.trace
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.ExecutionResult.traceValid

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {C : CT16.Capability P} → {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → List CT16.Graph.NodeId → Prop
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.ValidTrace

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (C : CT16.Capability P) → (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → CT16.Input C ctx → CT16.ExecutionResult C ctx
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.run

internalDeclarations.type: CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.NodeId.codeComparison

internalDeclarations.type: CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.NodeId.equalTerminal

internalDeclarations.type: CT16.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.NodeId.mismatchTerminal

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (Coordinate : Type uCoordinate) →
    FinEnum Coordinate →
      (InSupport : P.Ambient → Coordinate → Prop) →
        ((G : P.Ambient) → (coordinate : Coordinate) → Decidable (InSupport G coordinate)) →
          (ClosedCode : Type uCode) → DecidableEq ClosedCode → (P.Ambient → ClosedCode) → ClosedCode → CT16.Capability P
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.mk

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (G : P.Ambient) → P.Baseline G → P.BranchState G → Core.BranchContext P
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.BranchContext.mk

internalDeclarations.type: (Ambient : Type uAmbient) → (Ambient → Prop) → (Ambient → ℕ) → (Ambient → Type uBranch) → Core.Problem
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem.mk

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → value ∈ xs → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some value → decide (p value) = true
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  decide (p value) = true → p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = none → ∀ value ∈ xs, p value → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (motive : Option α → Sort u_2) →
    (x : Option α) → ((value : α) → x = some value → motive (some value)) → (x = none → motive none) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        (t : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ xs) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent none)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → Core.BranchContext P → P.Ambient

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT16.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      (motive : (b a : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a b → Sort u_5) →
        (b a : CT16.Graph.NodeId) →
          (x : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a b) →
            ((n : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT16.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
              ((b a b_1 : CT16.Graph.NodeId) →
                  (e : CT16.Graph.Edge C ctx a b_1) →
                    (rest : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx b_1 b) → motive b a (CT16.Graph.Path.cons e rest)) →
                motive b a x

internalDeclarations.type:

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT16.Capability P) →
    (context : Core.BranchContext P) →
      (state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context) →
        (motive : Decidable (state.code = capability.targetCode) → Sort u_5) →
          (x : Decidable (state.code = capability.targetCode)) →
            ((equal : state.code = capability.targetCode) → motive (isTrue equal)) →
              ((notEqual : ¬state.code = capability.targetCode) → motive (isFalse notEqual)) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.compareCode.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →

        {motive : CT16.CodeDecision capability context state → Sort u} →
          (t : CT16.CodeDecision capability context state) →
            ((certificate : CT16.ExactCodeCertificate capability context) →
                motive (CT16.CodeDecision.equal certificate)) →
              ((residual : CT16.ClosedTypeMismatchResidual capability context) →
                  motive (CT16.CodeDecision.mismatch residual)) →
                motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.CodeDecision.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →

          ((residual : CT16.ProperSupportResidual capability context) → motive (CT16.SupportDecision.proper residual)) →
            ((state : CT16.WholeSupportState capability context) → motive (CT16.SupportDecision.whole state)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.SupportDecision.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT16.Capability P) (context : Core.BranchContext P),
  (∀ (value : capability.Coordinate), ¬¬capability.InSupport context.G value) →
    CT16.WholeSupportState capability context
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.scanSupport._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT16.Capability P) →
    (context : Core.BranchContext P) →
      (coordinate : capability.Coordinate) →
        (motive : Decidable (capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) → Sort u_5) →
          (x : Decidable (capability.InSupport context.G coordinate)) →
            ((present : capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) → motive (isTrue present)) →
              ((absent : ¬capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) → motive (isFalse absent)) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.scanSupport.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT16.Capability P) →
    (context : Core.BranchContext P) →
      (motive : (Core.FiniteSearch.Result fun coordinate => ¬capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) → Sort u_5) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.Result fun coordinate => ¬capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) →
          ((coordinate : capability.Coordinate) →
              (absent : ¬capability.InSupport context.G coordinate) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found coordinate absent)) →
            ((noneMissing : ∀ (value : capability.Coordinate), ¬¬capability.InSupport context.G value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent noneMissing)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.scanSupport.match_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT16.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a a_1 → Sort u} →
        ((n : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT16.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
          ({a b z : CT16.Graph.NodeId} →
              (a_1 : CT16.Graph.Edge C ctx a b) →
                (a_2 : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx b z) → motive b z a_2 → motive a z (CT16.Graph.Path.cons a_1 a_2)) →
            {a a_1 : CT16.Graph.NodeId} → (t : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a a_1) → motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.Path.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {C : CT16.Capability P} →
    {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT16.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx a a_1) →
            ((n : CT16.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT16.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
              ({a b z : CT16.Graph.NodeId} →
                  (a_2 : CT16.Graph.Edge C ctx a b) →
                    (a_3 : CT16.Graph.Path C ctx b z) → motive a z (CT16.Graph.Path.cons a_2 a_3)) →
                motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Graph.Path.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT16.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →
  motive CT16.Graph.Terminal.proper →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT16.Capability P} →
    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →
      {state : CT16.ClosedCodeState capability context} →
        {motive : CT16.CodeDecision capability context state → Sort u} →
          ((certificate : CT16.ExactCodeCertificate capability context) →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →

    {context : Core.BranchContext P} →

        ((residual : CT16.ProperSupportResidual capability context) → motive (CT16.SupportDecision.proper residual)) →
          ((state : CT16.WholeSupportState capability context) → motive (CT16.SupportDecision.whole state)) →
            (t : CT16.SupportDecision capability context) → motive t

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →

    {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.Result p → Sort u_1} →

        ((value : α) → (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found value holds)) →
          ((none : ∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent none)) → motive t

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {p : α → Prop} →
    {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.Result p → Sort u_1} →

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of coordinates that make up the relevant support.
presentation.label: Support coordinate

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of exact codes classifying a whole-support closed object.
presentation.label: Closed-type code

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of every support coordinate.
presentation.label: Finite support coordinates

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that coordinate c belongs to the support of G.
presentation.label: Support-membership predicate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT16.Capability P) → P.Ambient → self.Coordinate → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.InSupport

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a coordinate lies in the support.
presentation.label: Support-membership decision

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT16.Capability P) →
    (G : P.Ambient) → (coordinate : self.Coordinate) → Decidable (self.InSupport G coordinate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.inSupportDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the exact closed-type code of an ambient object after whole support is established.
presentation.label: Computed closed code

presentation.plainExplanation: The distinguished closed-type code that certifies the target case.
presentation.label: Target closed code

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable equality on closed codes, used for the final exact comparison.
presentation.label: Code equality decision

∀ {P : Core.Problem} (C : CT16.Capability P) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) (input : CT16.Input C ctx)
  (a b : CT16.ExecutionResult C ctx), a = CT16.run C ctx input → b = CT16.run C ctx input → a = b
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {C : CT16.Capability P} {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} (r : CT16.ExecutionResult C ctx),
  r.terminal = CT16.Graph.Terminal.proper ∨
    r.terminal = CT16.Graph.Terminal.equal ∨ r.terminal = CT16.Graph.Terminal.mismatch
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.residualKindContracts

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of coordinates that make up the relevant support.
presentation.label: Support coordinate

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of exact codes classifying a whole-support closed object.
presentation.label: Closed-type code

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of every support coordinate.
presentation.label: Finite support coordinates

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that coordinate c belongs to the support of G.
presentation.label: Support-membership predicate

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT16.Capability P) → P.Ambient → self.Coordinate → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.InSupport

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a coordinate lies in the support.
presentation.label: Support-membership decision

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT16.Capability P) →
    (G : P.Ambient) → (coordinate : self.Coordinate) → Decidable (self.InSupport G coordinate)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT16.Capability.inSupportDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the exact closed-type code of an ambient object after whole support is established.
presentation.label: Computed closed code

presentation.plainExplanation: The distinguished closed-type code that certifies the target case.
presentation.label: Target closed code

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable equality on closed codes, used for the final exact comparison.
presentation.label: Code equality decision
